title: The Tale of Kieu: Vietnam's National Epic
description: The most beloved poem in Vietnamese literature — a woman's 15-year odyssey through suffering, betrayal, and redemption.
introduction: The most beloved poem in Vietnamese literature — a woman's 15-year odyssey through suffering, betrayal, and redemption.

translation.text: A hundred years — in this life span on earth, how many times does genius find itself beset by cruel fate? The beautiful are born to suffer. Such is the law of heaven.
